back_translation: Therefore, as a fellow elder of the church, a witness to the sufferings of Christ, and one who shares in the glory that will be revealed, I appeal to the elders of the church among you
Be shepherds of the flock of God that is among you, watching over them not by compulsion but willingly according to the will of God; not from greed for shameful gain but with eagerness
Not by lording it over those whom He has entrusted to you, but be examples to the flock
And when the Chief Shepherd appears, you will receive the unfading crown of glory

In the same way, young men, submit yourselves to the elders of the church. And all of you, clothe yourselves with humility toward one another, because, “God opposes the proud, but gives grace to the humble”
Therefore, humble yourselves under the mighty hand of God, so that He may exalt you at the proper time
Cast all your anxiety on Him, because He cares for you
Be sober-minded and alert. Your adversary, the devil, prowls around like a roaring lion, seeking someone to devour
Resist him, standing firm in faith, knowing that the brotherhood of yours in the world is undergoing the same sufferings
And the God of all grace, who has called you into His eternal glory in Christ, after you have suffered for a little while, will Himself complete you, make you firm, make you strong, and establish you
May power be to Him forever and ever. Amen
I have written to you briefly through Silvanus, the faithful brother, as I regard him, in order to encourage you and to testify that this is the true grace of God. Stand firm in that grace
The church in Babylon, the one chosen together with you all, sends greetings to you, and so does Mark my son
Greet one another with a kiss of love. May peace be to all of you who are in Christ
